text: I feel a gentle curiosity and hope as I stand here. The sterile, modern environment outside the glass walls is softened by the hum of conversation and movement. As I step into the R+D space, words like 'responsive,' 'development,' and 'research' fill my senses with a sense of purpose and open-ended possibility. There is a quiet optimism emanating from the thoughtful arrangement of objects and text. It makes me reflect on the role of intention and reflection in building a better world, and I feel both small and inspired in this space dedicated to innovation and thought.
